feed.title: Horizon Daily
feed.subtitle: AI-curated daily digest of tech and research news

entry.title: Horizon Summary: 2026-05-06 (ZH)
entry.content:
From 64 items, 2 important content pieces were selected

  1. Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I’d like ⭐️ 8.0/10
  2. sgl-project/sglang released v0.5.11 ⭐️ 8.0/10

Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I’d like ⭐️ 8.0/10

Simon Willison observes that ‘vibe coding’ and agentic engineering are starting to overlap in his work, raising concerns about the software development lifecycle’s ability to handle AI-accelerated code production.

rss · Simon Willison · May 6, 14:24 · 社区讨论

标签: #AI coding, #software engineering, #vibe coding, #agentic engineering, #LLMs

sgl-project/sglang released v0.5.11 ⭐️ 8.0/10

sglang v0.5.11 upgrades to CUDA 13 and PyTorch 2.11, makes Speculative Decoding V2 default for lower CPU overhead, adds decode radix cache for prefill/decode disaggregation, and supports new models like Gemma 4 and Qwen3.6.

github · Kangyan-Zhou · May 5, 21:28

标签: #sglang, #release, #llm-serving, #performance-optimization, #speculative-decoding
entry.summary: From 64 items, 2 important content pieces were selected
